name: Airtable
description: Read and write records in any Airtable base. Used by PM teams worldwide to track roadmaps, content calendars, sprints, and customer data.

auth.hint: Create a Personal Access Token in your Airtable account under Account → Developer Hub.

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: List records from a table in your Airtable base. Supports filtering and sorting.

params.name: baseId
params.description: Base ID from the Airtable URL, e.g. appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX

params.name: tableId
params.description: Table name or ID, e.g. "Tasks" or tblXXXXXXXX

params.name: maxRecords
params.description: Max number of records to return

params.name: view
params.description: View name or ID to use for ordering and filters

tools.name: get_record
tools.description: Get a single record by its ID from an Airtable table.

params.name: baseId
params.description: Base ID from the Airtable URL

params.name: recordId
params.description: Record ID starting with "rec", e.g. recXXXXXXXX

tools.name: create_record
tools.description: Create a new record in an Airtable table.

params.name: baseId
params.description: Base ID from the Airtable URL

params.name: fields
params.description: Record fields matching your column names, e.g. {"Name":"Task A","Status":"To do","Priority":"High"}

tools.name: update_record
tools.description: Update one or more fields of an existing record. Only the specified fields are changed.

params.name: baseId
params.description: Base ID from the Airtable URL

tools.name: delete_record
tools.description: Permanently delete a record from an Airtable table.

params.name: baseId
params.description: Base ID from the Airtable URL
